properties.name: events.exchange-name

properties.description: Event routing key for Statement deletion events

properties.name: external.azure-blob-storage.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for Azure Blob Storage API

properties.description: Azure Storage connection string (use Jasypt encryption)

properties.description: Connection timeout in milliseconds for Azure Blob Storage API calls

properties.name: external.azure-blob-storage.timeout.read
properties.description: Read timeout in milliseconds for Azure Blob Storage API calls

properties.name: external.api.timeout.connect
properties.description: Default connection timeout in milliseconds for external API calls

properties.name: external.api.timeout.read
properties.description: Default read timeout in milliseconds for external API calls

properties.name: download.hmac-secret
properties.description: HMAC secret key for signing download tokens (use Vault in production)

properties.name: download.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for download link generation

groups.name: events
